---
title: "Contact"
page-layout: full
---

<div class="container-fluid content">
<div class="row">
<div class="col-12">
<img src="../images/header.jpg" class="header-image" alt="Header image">
</div>
</div>

<div class="row">
<div class="col-md-12">

<div class="row mt-4">
<div class="col-md-6">
<div class="card contact-card">
<div class="card-body">
<h3><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email</h3>
<p>ruike[AT]nucl.ph.tsukuba.ac.jp</p>

<h3 class="mt-4"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Location</h3>
<p>
Center for Computational Sciences<br>
University of Tsukuba<br>
1-1-1 Tennodai, Tsukuba<br>
Ibaraki 305-8577, Japan
</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col-md-6">
<div class="card contact-card">
<div class="card-body">
<h3><i class="bi bi-link"></i> Related Links</h3>
<ul class="list-unstyled">
<li><a href="https://www.ccs.tsukuba.ac.jp/eng/" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-laptop"></i> Center for Computational Sciences, University of Tsukuba</a></li>
<li><a href="https://wwwnucl.ph.tsukuba.ac.jp/" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-laptop"></i> Nuclear Theory Laboratory, University of Tsukuba</a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/yourusername" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a></li>
<!-- <li><a href="https://www.instagram.com/___toilet/" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-instagram"></i> Instagram</a></li> -->
</ul>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
